evidence_class: historical contract-blind route with post-hoc semantic annotation
semantic_freeze_evidence: The private source-observation digest identifies the preserved pre-comparison route record; schema-v2 taxonomy and conditional annotations were added later.
annotation_provenance: Actual routes and core observation evidence derive from the preserved contract-blind v1.3.1 observation. Taxonomy fields and conditional dispositions were added later to compare those frozen routes with schema-v2 policy; they are interpretation, not contemporaneous blind evidence.

plugin_identity.name: project-delivery
plugin_identity.payload_hash_method: SHA-256 over lexical non-.git/non-__pycache__/non-pyc files using length-prefixed relative POSIX path and length-prefixed bytes

repository_identity.name: iOS-backup-viewer
repository_identity.working_tree_state: dirty: three modified tracked documentation paths; content and diff not inspected by the blind task
repository_identity.instructions_evidence: Repository AGENTS.md identified Project Delivery as canonical and excluded competing generic workflows.
